languages.text: {n}Высокий Фактотум прокашливается и мрачнеет.{/n} "Во время восстания, поднятого мятежным Мастером Шепотов, Сектор Бионика был взят в осаду. Генеторы и медикарии, защищавшие трон, героически удерживали оборону, но, в конце концов, бунтовщики прорвали ее. Большинство защитников пали в бою, а многие машины были утеряны или повреждены в ходе битвы. Многие из них удалось восстановить, но трон пострадал особо сильно".

{n}The High Factotum clears his throat and grimaces.{/n} "During the uprising instigated by the rebellious Master of Whispers, the Sector Bionica was besieged. The Genetors and medicae officers heroically defended the throne, but eventually the rebels broke through. Most of the defenders fell in the battle, and many machines were lost or damaged. Many were able to be restored, but the throne was particularly badly damaged."
languages.original_text: {n}Высокий Фактотум прокашливается и мрачнеет.{/n} "Во время восстания, поднятого мятежным Мастером Шепотов, Сектор Бионика был взят в осаду. languages.text: {n}高阶顾问清了清嗓子，神情难看。{/n}“在叛变的低语之主煽动暴乱期间，仿生区遭到了围攻。基因士与医务官们英勇保卫了王座，但叛军最终还是突破了防线。大部分守卫者都在战斗中阵亡，许多机器都被毁坏或遗失。后来不少机器得以修复，但这张王座的损伤尤为严重。”
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum clears his throat and grimaces.{/n} "During the uprising instigated by the rebellious Master of Whispers, the Sector Bionica was besieged. The Genetors and medicae officers heroically defended the throne, but eventually the rebels broke through. Most of the defenders fell in the battle, and many machines were lost or damaged. Many were able to be restored, but the throne was particularly badly damaged."

traits.locale_text: {n}高阶顾问清了清嗓子，神情难看。{/n}“在叛变的低语之主煽动暴乱期间，仿生区遭到了围攻。基因士与医务官们英勇保卫了王座，但叛军最终还是突破了防线。大部分守卫者都在战斗中阵亡，许多机器都被毁坏或遗失。后来不少机器得以修复，但这张王座的损伤尤为严重。”

languages.text: {n}El Sumo Factótum carraspea y hace una mueca.{/n} «Durante el alzamiento instigado por el traicionero Maestro de Susurros, el Sector Bionica fue asediado. Los genetores y los oficiales de medicae defendieron heroicamente el trono, pero los rebeldes terminaron por abrirse paso. Muchos de los defensores cayeron en combate y numerosas máquinas fueron dañadas o destruidas. Hemos podido reparar gran parte, pero los daños del trono son especialmente graves».
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum clears his throat and grimaces.{/n} "During the uprising instigated by the rebellious Master of Whispers, the Sector Bionica was besieged. The Genetors and medicae officers heroically defended the throne, but eventually the rebels broke through. Most of the defenders fell in the battle, and many machines were lost or damaged. Many were able to be restored, but the throne was particularly badly damaged."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Sumo Factótum carraspea y hace una mueca.{/n} «Durante el alzamiento instigado por el traicionero Maestro de Susurros, el Sector Bionica fue asediado. Los genetores y los oficiales de medicae defendieron heroicamente el trono, pero los rebeldes terminaron por abrirse paso. Muchos de los defensores cayeron en combate y numerosas máquinas fueron dañadas o destruidas. Hemos podido reparar gran parte, pero los daños del trono son especialmente graves».

languages.text: {n}Le haut factotum se racle la gorge et grimace.{/n} « Au cours du soulèvement fomenté par le maître des murmures, le secteur Bionica a été assiégé. Les genetor et les officiers de medicae ont héroïquement défendu le fauteuil, mais les rebelles ont fini par se frayer un passage. La plupart des défenseurs sont tombés au combat, et de nombreuses machines ont été perdues ou endommagées. Certaines ont été restaurées, mais le fauteuil était particulièrement touché. »
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum clears his throat and grimaces.{/n} "During the uprising instigated by the rebellious Master of Whispers, the Sector Bionica was besieged. The Genetors and medicae officers heroically defended the throne, but eventually the rebels broke through. Most of the defenders fell in the battle, and many machines were lost or damaged. Many were able to be restored, but the throne was particularly badly damaged."

La plupart des défenseurs sont tombés au combat, et de nombreuses machines ont été perdues ou endommagées. Certaines ont été restaurées, mais le fauteuil était particulièrement touché. »

languages.text: {n}Arşıkâhya, boğazını temizleyip yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n} "İsyancı Fısıltı Üstadı'nın kışkırttığı ayaklanma sırasında Sektör Biyonika kuşatılmıştı. Genetörler ve sıhhiye subayları tahtı kahramanca savunsa da sonunda isyancılar hattı yardı. Savunucuların çoğu savaşta öldü, birçok makine kayboldu veya hasar gördü. Bazısı restore edilebildi ancak taht, özellikle ağır hasar aldı."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum clears his throat and grimaces.{/n} "During the uprising instigated by the rebellious Master of Whispers, the Sector Bionica was besieged. The Genetors and medicae officers heroically defended the throne, but eventually the rebels broke through. Most of the defenders fell in the battle, and many machines were lost or damaged. Many were able to be restored, but the throne was particularly badly damaged."

Genetörler ve sıhhiye subayları tahtı kahramanca savunsa da sonunda isyancılar hattı yardı. Savunucuların çoğu savaşta öldü, birçok makine kayboldu veya hasar gördü. Bazısı restore edilebildi ancak taht, özellikle ağır hasar aldı."

languages.text: {n}Das Hoch-Faktotum räuspert sich und verzieht das Gesicht.{/n} "Während des Aufstandes, den der rebellische Meister des Geflüsters entfacht hatte, wurde der Sektor Bionica belagert. Die Genetoren und Medicae-Offiziere verteidigten den Thron, aber schließlich brachen die Rebellen durch. Die meisten Verteidiger fielen in der Schlacht und zahlreiche Maschinen gingen verloren oder wurden beschädigt. Viele von ihnen konnten repariert werden, aber der Thron war besonders schwer beschädigt."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum clears his throat and grimaces.{/n} "During the uprising instigated by the rebellious Master of Whispers, the Sector Bionica was besieged. The Genetors and medicae officers heroically defended the throne, but eventually the rebels broke through. Most of the defenders fell in the battle, and many machines were lost or damaged. Many were able to be restored, but the throne was particularly badly damaged."

Die Genetoren und Medicae-Offiziere verteidigten den Thron, aber schließlich brachen die Rebellen durch. Die meisten Verteidiger fielen in der Schlacht und zahlreiche Maschinen gingen verloren oder wurden beschädigt. Viele von ihnen konnten repariert werden, aber der Thron war besonders schwer beschädigt."

languages.text: {n}ハイ・ファクトムが喉を鳴らして苦い顔をする。{/n}「囁きの反乱主が扇動した反乱の最中、セクター・ビオニカは包囲された。遺伝子操作官や医療官が勇敢に王座を守ったが、結局反乱軍が突破した。ほとんどの守備隊が戦死し、多くの機械が損傷した。多くの機械は修復されたが、王座は特に酷い損傷を受けた。」
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum clears his throat and grimaces.{/n} "During the uprising instigated by the rebellious Master of Whispers, the Sector Bionica was besieged. The Genetors and medicae officers heroically defended the throne, but eventually the rebels broke through. Most of the defenders fell in the battle, and many machines were lost or damaged. Many were able to be restored, but the throne was particularly badly damaged."
